title: artemisia campestris var. brachyphylla
intro: Artemisia campestris var. brachyphylla, also known as short-leaved sagebrush or short-leaved mugwort, is a variety of the artemisia campestris plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of artemisia campestris var. brachyphylla include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce the risk of certain infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
